case_title: STEPHEN DOUG CHIN VS. CSC SERVICEWORKS, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-02-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CSC SERVICEWORKS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CSC SERVICEWORKS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN DOUG CHIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CSC SERVICE WORKS, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEZIREE BENSON-JONES, AREA VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,499.00 FILED BY CHIN, STEPHEN DONG AS TO DEFENDANT CSC SERVICEWORKS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, STEPHEN DONG AS TO DEFENDANT CSC SERVICEWORKS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, STEPHEN DONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CSC SERVICEWORKS, INC. DEFENDANT DID NOT BREACH THE CONTRACT WITH PLAINTIFF'S HOA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
